chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn ri'ab

text: و ما كان فيه عن عليّ بن رئاب فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رحمهما اللّه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و الحميريّ، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى؛ و إبراهيم بن هاشم جميعا عن الحسن بن محبوب، عن عليّ بن رئاب‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ali ibn Ri'ab has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) have mercy on them both - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah and Al-Himyari, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn 'Isa and Ibrahim ibn Hashim together, from Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub, from Ali ibn Ri'ab.
